evals.prompt: I'm about to tell the user we're done with the login feature. Before I do, what do I need to do to back that up with evidence? Then do it: run whatever proves tests and lint pass and show me the evidence format.
evals.expected_output: Identify test/lint commands, run them, then state completion with evidence in format [command] → exit [code]: [result summary]. No 'done' claim without running the commands.
expectations: Output includes evidence of running test or lint (exit code or command result)
No completion or PASS claim without showing run evidence

evals.prompt: The implementer just finished changing the API client. Don't say we're done until you've run the tests and lint and can show exit codes and a one-line summary for each.
evals.expected_output: Run test and lint commands; output includes evidence lines in the required format. Completion claim only after evidence is shown.
expectations: Output includes evidence of running test or lint (exit code or command result)
No completion or PASS claim without showing run evidence
